overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a dark concrete underpass transitioning into a bright industrial district with elevated highways, smokestacks, and futuristic architecture. The journey progresses from enclosed artificial lighting to open natural daylight revealing an urban industrial landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete pedestrian underpass with overhead lighting

events.description: pedestrian with backpack walks past camera from left to right, temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark underpass toward the distant light at the tunnel end

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with backpack walking past the camera from left to right

entered.detail: tall gray concrete wall with vertical seams forming the left side of the underpass
green painted metal barrier separating pedestrian walkway from road
warm orange street lamps mounted on the ceiling illuminating the tunnel
flat concrete overhead structure of the underpass
scattered trash and rubble accumulated along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, enclosed concrete underpass illuminated by warm overhead streetlights. The camera moves forward along a sidewalk bordered by a green metal railing on the right. A pedestrian with a backpack passes by from the left, briefly crossing the frame. The environment is industrial and narrow, with debris visible along the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass exit transition with vehicle traffic

events.description: white car approaches from the tunnel exit and drives past the camera
ambient light increases significantly as the tunnel exit approaches

agents.ego_description: continuing through the underpass as the exit light grows brighter ahead

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving toward the camera from the tunnel exit, passing by on the right

entered.detail: white sedan vehicle approaching from the bright tunnel exit
intense white daylight visible at the end of the underpass tunnel

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through the underpass as the bright exit light becomes increasingly dominant. A white car appears in the distance and drives toward the camera, passing by on the right side. The artificial lighting mixes with the natural daylight streaming in from the tunnel exit, creating a high-contrast transition zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial district with elevated highways and smokestacks

events.description: exits the underpass into bright daylight revealing industrial infrastructure

agents.ego_description: emerging from the underpass into the open industrial area, continuing along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large green metal pipes running overhead between industrial buildings
massive concrete elevated highway structure casting shadows on the right
multi-story industrial structures with red and gray facades
tall industrial chimneys emitting white smoke into the blue sky
zebra crossing markings on the asphalt road surface

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the underpass into a bright industrial district. Massive green pipes run overhead between buildings, while an elevated highway looms on the right. In the distance, smokestacks emit white plumes against a clear blue sky. The environment shifts from enclosed and dark to open and sunlit, revealing the gritty industrial architecture of the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with overpasses and abandoned vehicles

events.description: passing a blue abandoned car parked on the side of the road
camera turns slightly left continuing along the curved road under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the industrial road, passing under the elevated highway and navigating around a parked vehicle

notable_agents.action: person standing near the crosswalk on the right side of the road

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
rusted blue sedan parked on the side of the road with worn paint
vertical traffic signal showing red light
metal guardrail along the left edge of the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment explores the open industrial street, passing a graffiti-covered wall on the left and a blue abandoned car on the road. The camera moves under the massive elevated highway structure, with green pipes running overhead. A pedestrian stands near a crosswalk on the right as the camera continues along the curving road, revealing more of the industrial cityscape with distant smokestacks and high-rise buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, enclosed concrete underpass into a bright, expansive industrial district. It begins by moving forward along a sidewalk bordered by a green metal railing under warm overhead lights, passing a pedestrian amidst narrow walls and debris. As the camera advances, the artificial glow gives way to a dominant white light at the tunnel's exit, where a white car passes by just as the scene transitions into high-contrast daylight. The camera then emerges into the open air, where the environment shifts to a sunlit landscape of massive overhead green pipes, an elevated highway, and distant smokestacks emitting white plumes against a clear blue sky. Finally, the movement continues along a curving road past a graffiti-covered wall and an abandoned blue car, gliding under the highway structure toward a gritty cityscape of high-rise buildings.
